summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Activities page for OpenClaw management system - real-time agent behavior monitoring fully functional

design_issues.issue: Event Type and Status filter dropdowns have click interception issues with modal overlays

passed_tests: Activities page loads correctly at /activities route
Stats bar displays total, running, errors, and top tools
Agent Activity bar chart section renders with visual bars
Live toggle switch enables/disables auto-refresh every 4 seconds
Simulate button generates 3-8 new activity events per click
Activity stream shows events with agent name, event type, tool name, status, duration
Clicking activity rows expands to show verbose output details
Expanded view shows tool input/output, session keys, peer info, timestamps
Agent filter dropdown works and filters activities correctly
Navigation to/from Activities page works properly
Activities nav item is highlighted when active
Clear button is accessible (not tested to avoid data loss)
Real-time stats updates when new activities are generated
Multiple activities can be expanded simultaneously
Live indicator shows when auto-refresh is active
Backend API GET /api/activities returns activity list with filtering
Backend API GET /api/activities/stats returns aggregated statistics
Backend API POST /api/activities/simulate generates new activities
Backend API DELETE /api/activities clears all activities
Backend API GET /api/activities/{id} returns individual activity details
